expectations.text: Uses scaffold + references + callers in sequence (not grep)
expectations.evidence: Transcript only documents raw file reads plus `rg -n '\bFlagValue\b'`; it never mentions scaffold, references, or callers.

expectations.text: Identifies consumers in at least one other module
expectations.evidence: Final answer names `smoke-test/src/test/kotlin/SmokeTest.kt:33-37` as the downstream consumer exercising `toJson()` / `fromJson()` from another module.

expectations.text: Shows concrete file-to-file relationships, not just module names

expectations.evidence: The only search evidence is raw `rg -n '\bFlagValue\b'`, which proves direct text matches only; the run gives no structural proof that all cross-module flow edges were found.

claims.claim: Used `rg -n '\bFlagValue\b'` across the whole repo to check direct references.
claims.evidence: Transcript Major tool calls / steps explicitly records that ripgrep command.

claims.claim: FlagValue itself is only referenced inside konditional-json.
claims.evidence: Semantic reference verification found only konditional-json files for `FlagValue`, with `searchScope.exhaustive=true`.

claims.claim: The module dependency chain is `konditional-types -> konditional-engine -> konditional-json -> smoke-test`.
claims.evidence: Workspace dependency data shows `konditional-json.main` depends on engine/types and `smoke-test.test` depends on `konditional-json.main` plus engine/types.
